findings.description: Source h2 'バッチアプリケーションの処理の流れ' contains three h3 subsections (Batchlet, Chunk, 例外(エラー含む)発生時の処理の流れ) with substantial content well exceeding 2000 characters, but all content is merged into a single s3 section in the knowledge file. Consider splitting into separate sections for Batchlet flow, Chunk flow, and exception handling.
findings.source_evidence: RST h3 anchors: _jsr352-batch_flow_batchlet, _jsr352-batch_flow_chunk, _jsr352-batch_error_flow — each with substantial content including numbered steps, images, and subsections
